background.title: Background Questions
background.description: Please answer the following questions honestly. False information may result in your application being refused.
background.disclaimer: These questions are required by UK immigration authorities. Answer truthfully.

criminal.question: Have you ever been convicted of a criminal offence in any country?
criminal.help: Include all convictions, even if considered 'spent' or minor

immigration.question: Have you ever breached immigration laws in any country?
immigration.help: This includes overstaying visas or working without permission

refusal.question: Have you ever been refused entry to or deported from any country?
refusal.help: Include any country, not just the UK

terrorism.question: Have you ever been involved in or supported terrorist or extremist activities?
terrorism.help: This includes any form of involvement or support

background.warning: Providing false information is a criminal offence and may result in prosecution.

errors.criminalRequired: Please answer the criminal conviction question
errors.immigrationRequired: Please answer the immigration breach question

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the UK ETA.

q1.a: The UK Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) is a digital travel permit required for visa-free visitors to the UK. It links to your passport electronically and must be obtained before travel.

q2.a: Nationals of countries that don't require a visa to visit the UK will need an ETA. This includes citizens from GCC countries, and will expand to EU citizens and others in 2025.

q3.q: How long does the ETA last?
q3.a: A UK ETA is valid for 2 years or until your passport expires (whichever comes first). It allows multiple visits of up to 6 months each for tourism, business, or transit.

q4.a: Most ETA applications are processed within 3 working days. However, some applications may take longer if additional checks are required.

q5.q: What's included in your service fee?
q5.a: Our fee covers application review, document verification, submission handling, status tracking, and customer support. The government ETA fee is separate and paid directly.

q6.a: Absolutely. We use 256-bit SSL encryption, comply with UK GDPR, and never share your data with third parties. Your information is deleted after your application is processed.

cta.title: Ready to Apply?
cta.subtitle: Start your UK ETA application now and travel with confidence.

hero.title: About UK ETA Service
hero.subtitle: We're a dedicated team helping travelers navigate the UK's Electronic Travel Authorisation system with ease and confidence.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: When the UK announced its new Electronic Travel Authorisation requirement, we saw an opportunity to help. Many travelers found the official process confusing, especially those unfamiliar with UK government websites or non-native English speakers.
story.p2: We built this service to bridge that gap. Our team combines expertise in immigration processes with modern technology to create a smooth, guided experience that takes the stress out of applying.
story.p3: Every application is personally reviewed by our team before submission, ensuring accuracy and completeness. We catch potential issues before they become problems, giving you the best chance of approval.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Your data is protected with bank-level encryption. We never share your information with third parties.

customer.title: Customer Focused
customer.desc: We're here to make your travel easier. Our team personally reviews every application.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We strive for the highest standards in everything we do, from our technology to our customer service.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Our service is available in multiple languages to serve travelers from around the world.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.item1: Guide you through every step of the ETA application process
whatWeDo.item2: Verify your documents for accuracy and completeness
whatWeDo.item3: Submit your application to UK authorities on your behalf
whatWeDo.item4: Track your application status and keep you informed
whatWeDo.item5: Provide support if any issues arise
whatWeDo.item6: Offer refunds if your application is rejected due to our error
whatWeDo.noteText: We are an independent service and not affiliated with the UK Government. We provide assistance with ETA applications for a service fee. You can also apply directly through the official UK Government website.
